---
title: "The GIS Commandments"
css: /Styles/website_styles.scss
---

\

1.  Thou shalt not work from the Downloads folder.

2.  Thou shalt understand how file directories are structured (even if you wish you didn't need to).

3.  Know your projection.

4.  Save projects early and often!

5.  Thou shalt google (look things up when you have questions).

6.  Embrace mistakes (you will make mistakes).
